series_metadata.series_title: Revenue Receipts and Holding Account Dis
series_metadata.series_description: Used to deposit and record revenue receipts from any known revenue source and to hold unknown receipts for redistribution. Also used by agencies which have established departmental holding fund from which revenue is redistributed or by any agency which receives revenue from an unknown source and deposits it to a fund using the revenue source code. (HP-54, HP-64B)

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for 3 years, then destroy preovided audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released., Paper: Shred
